latin: Kratos et Atreus cineres matris ad summum montem ferre debebant. iter longum et periculosum erat. pater puero artem pugnandi docebat, sed etiam patientiam discere debebat.

questions.prompt: What are Kratos and Atreus carrying?

translation: Kratos and Atreus had to carry their mother's ashes to the top of the highest mountain. The journey was long and dangerous. The father taught the boy the art of fighting, but he himself also had to learn patience.
